arts.ttl: Ex-players bemused after Darwin Nunez denied penalty for Liverpool in Champions League
arts.sum: The striker scored against RB Leipzig but should also have won a spot-kick soon after

arts.ttl: TNT Sports forced to broadcast on-air apology after problem during RB Leipzig vs Liverpool
arts.sum: The broadcasters were forced to share an on-screen apology for the disruption caused to paying viewers during Liverpool's latest Champions League game.

arts.ttl: Liverpool legend claims Darwin Nunez's days 'could be numbered' after scoring just ONE league goal this season - before Uruguayan breaks the deadlock against RB Leipzig
arts.sum: The Uruguayan has found the back of the net just once for Arne Slot 's side, bringing his total goal tally for Liverpool up to 34 since joining for £85million in 2022.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot could break two Liverpool records with RB Leipzig win
arts.sum: Liverpool take on RB Leipzig in the Champions League on Wednesday night and a win for the Reds would see Arne Slot break two records at the Merseyside club. arts.ttl: €100m Chelsea target could be set to replace Mohamed Salah at Liverpool
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah’s future at Liverpool remains up in the air and should the superstar leave Anfield, the Reds have Borussia Dortmund’s Jamie Gittens in mind to replace the Egypt captain. arts.ttl: How much will Arsenal miss Saliba against Liverpool?
arts.sum: Arsenal's 2-0 defeat at AFC Bournemouth has ramped up pressure on Mikel Arteta's side, ahead of their big Premier League clash with leaders Liverpool on Sunday. First, Saliba has the best success rate for tackles on dribblers in the Premier League this season, with 90 per cent.

arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: RB Leipzig vs. Liverpool
arts.sum: Official team news has just been released for Die Roten Bullen who welcome English giants Liverpool to the Leipzig Arena in Eastern Germany for Matchday 3 of the UEFA Champions League.
